category_sources: source_facts.description says Shibboleth Service Provider daemon; official Shibboleth SP3 documentation covers Service Provider deployment and management.
display_name_sources: Official Shibboleth SP3 documentation uses Service Provider 3; source_facts.name is shibboleth-sp.
docs_sources: Official Shibboleth Service Provider 3 Confluence space is the current documentation surface for all 3.x releases.
repo_sources: Official Shibboleth Source Code Access page says public repositories moved to Codeberg under Shibboleth; cpp-sp is the Service Provider source repository.
tags_sources: source_facts.executables lists shibd; official SP3 documentation covers Shibboleth Service Provider deployment, configuration, protocols, and security advisories.
